# Mark Andrew Boudoir

> Award-winning luxury boudoir photography with studios in South Bend, Indiana and Beaufort, South Carolina. Full-day, fully-guided sessions with complete head-to-toe posing direction, professional hair and makeup, and a same-day reveal of the finished gallery — designed so clients need no experience and don't have to feel "photogenic." Most clients invest $1,000–$2,000 in images at their reveal.

Mark Andrew is a luxury boudoir photographer serving women, couples, and men across the Michiana region (Mishawaka, Granger, Elkhart, Goshen, South Bend IN, and Niles MI) and the South Carolina Lowcountry (Beaufort, SC). Every session is a full-day experience: complete posing direction (no experience needed), professional hair and makeup, and a same-day reveal where clients view their fully edited gallery before they leave. It is $499 to book a date, which covers the session plus all prep and planning; images are purchased separately based on what each client loves most. Destination/travel boudoir shoots (New York City, St. Louis, London, Paris, Rome) start at $8,800.

## Key pages
- [Home](https://www.markandrewboudoir.com/): The boudoir experience, galleries, process, and how to book.
- [Boudoir cost in South Bend](https://www.markandrewboudoir.com/boudoir-photography-cost-south-bend/): How pricing and investment work.
- [What to wear](https://www.markandrewboudoir.com/what-to-wear-boudoir-session/): Wardrobe guidance for a session.
- [Lingerie guide](https://www.markandrewboudoir.com/lingerie-guide/): Pieces that flatter different body types and figures.
- [Is boudoir awkward?](https://www.markandrewboudoir.com/is-boudoir-awkward/): What the experience is actually like.
- [Journal](https://www.markandrewboudoir.com/blog/): Articles answering common boudoir questions.

## Services
- Women's, couples, men's, bridal, and maternity boudoir.
- Full-day sessions with complete posing direction — no experience required.
- Professional hair and makeup by artist Aletheia Jean.
- Same-day reveal of the fully edited gallery.
- Heirloom albums, wall art, fine-art prints, and digital collections.
- Travel/destination boudoir shoots from $8,800.
